Oklahoma · State Licensing Reference

Speech-Language Pathologist
Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist (SLP) Guide

Issued by the Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology under the Oklahoma Board of Examiners for SLP and Audiology. Data verified for 2026.

Visit Official Board Portal
Fees Board Contact License Types How to Apply Documents Telepractice Reciprocity FAQ
Total Initial Fee
$100
$50 application + $50 license fee
Renewal
$50
Every year
Processing Time
2 to 4 weeks
Subject to board volume
License Duration
1 year
From date of issuance
Board Contact

Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology

Mailing Address

3700 N. Classen Blvd., Suite 248, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

Physical Address

3700 N. Classen Blvd., Suite 248, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

Phone & Fax

Phone: (405) 524-4955

Fax: (405) 524-4957

Email

obespa@okbespa.org

Credential Categories

Oklahoma SLP License Types

Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist

Full credential for independent SLP practice in Oklahoma.

Provisional SLP License

For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

Application Process

How to Apply for a Oklahoma Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist (SLP)

Earn a Master's Degree in SLP

From a CAA-accredited program.

Pass the Praxis Examination

Test code 5331, score 162.

Complete Clinical Fellowship

36 weeks supervised clinical practice.

Submit Application

Submit with fees to the Board.

Required Documents

Application Document Checklist

  • Official graduate transcriptsFrom a CAA-accredited program.
  • Praxis exam score reportScore of 162 or higher.
  • Clinical Fellowship verificationCF completion documentation.
  • Background checkOSBI background check.
Telepractice

Oklahoma Telepractice Rules for SLPs

Telehealth Practice

Oklahoma permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

Practice Laws

Provisional Practice & Reciprocity

Clinical Fellowship & Provisional Rules

Oklahoma issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

Reciprocity & Endorsement

Oklahoma is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

Frequently Asked Questions

Oklahoma SLP FAQ

How much does an Oklahoma SLP license cost?

$100 initial. $50 annual renewal.

Is Oklahoma part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?

Yes.

Does Oklahoma allow telepractice for SLPs?

Yes.

Independent, YMYL-compliant licensing guides for speech-language pathologists across the United States.
